response.justification: While Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with 19+ years of solid full-stack engineering across multiple domains, this Principal Engineer role requires deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and demonstrated strategic leadership. The resume shows strong engineering fundamentals and recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows as of April 2025), but this is too nascent to establish the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms' the role demands. Critically missing: evidence of strategic customer advisory, product vision leadership, or strategic decision-making—the core responsibilities are advising partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption and identifying future product states, not implementing infrastructure. This candidate is a capable senior engineer transitioning into AI, not an established AI strategy leader.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience minimum with 19+ years across full-stack, cloud, embedded, and web systems
Demonstrates engineering leadership through mentoring, public speaking (FOSS4G, workshops), and open-source projects with real adoption (GISCollective used by Green Map)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows willingness to engage with cutting-edge technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise—MCP work (since April 2025) is tooling infrastructure, not strategic AI knowledge or recognized expertise in the field
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's or PhD in AI-related field, and no evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms
No evidence of strategic business acumen or customer advisory work; resume shows technical implementation focus, not strategic product vision or advising partners on technology adoption

key_factors.factor: Lack of strategic AI expertise and products
No evidence of strategic leadership or customer advisory
Exceeds experience duration and shows engineering depth
